description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master branch (excluding certain paths), and pull requests to master (excluding certain paths). The workflow should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with read permissions to repository contents. It should check out the code, install dependencies (ninja-build, ccache, quilt, and meson), cache ccache, install the beta NDK, and then build the project for Android using a custom build script and gradlew.
